zh.lifeSummary: Mrs. Humphrey "Henry" Solers於大約1117年出生在威爾士布雷康史爾坎崔福。她於大約1140年與Sir Humphrey "Henry" Solers II在威爾士布雷康史爾坎崔福結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世在英國威爾斯布雷康史爾利安哈苗拉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs. Humphrey "Henry" Solers于大约1117年出生在威尔士布雷康史爾坎崔福。她于大约1140年与Sir Humphrey "Henry" Solers II在威尔士布雷康史爾坎崔福结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世在英国威尔斯布雷康史爾利安哈苗拉。

nameMeanings.name: Solers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of   Sauers  , a surname of German origin.

variants.name: Sauers
meanings: German: variant of Sauer and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. The surname Sauers is very rare in Germany. Compare Souers and Sowers .

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. nameMeanings.name: "Henry"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Humphrey "Henry" Solers was born about 1117, in Cantref, Breconshire, Wales. She married Sir Humphrey "Henry" Solers II about 1140, in Cantref, Breconshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in Llanhamlach, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs. Humphrey "Henry" Solersは約1117年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアカントレフで生まれた。約1140年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアカントレフでSir Humphrey "Henry" Solers IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスウェールズブレコンシュアイアランハムラチで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Humphrey "Henry" Solers(은)는 대략 1117년 웨일스 브레콘실르 캔트레프에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1140년 웨일스 브레콘실르 캔트레프에서 Sir Humphrey "Henry" Solers II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 웨일스 브레콘실르 랜함라치에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs. Humphrey "Henry" Solers родилась около 1117 г. в местности кантреф, брекуншир, Уэльс. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Humphrey "Henry" Solers II около 1140 г. в местности кантреф, брекуншир, Уэльс. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в местности лланамлач, брекуншир, Уэльс, Великобритания.
